managed_ingress_binding_mismatch: Only the sole configured primary may manage follower remote storage targets
managed_ingress_default_delete_requires_: Set another remote storage target as default before deleting this default one
managed_ingress_default_error: The default remote storage target is not ready yet because it has a recorded error
managed_ingress_default_missing: Remote storage targets exist, but no default target is configured
managed_ingress_default_not_applied: The default remote storage target has not finished applying yet
managed_ingress_required: The follower cannot accept remote writes until a default remote storage target is configured by the primary
managed_ingress_default_update_requires_: You cannot unset the default remote storage target directly. Set another target as default first
managed_ingress_driver_unsupported: Remote storage targets only support local and S3 drivers
managed_ingress_local_path_invalid: The local target path must stay relative to the follower local target root
managed_ingress_single_primary_required: Remote storage targets require the follower to be bound to exactly one primary. Multi-primary followers are rejected directly
